mapper.select: SELECT t.*, tm.title AS terms_title, tm.terms_type FROM TERMS_PACKAGES tp INNER JOIN PACKAGE_TERMS pt ON tp.package_id = pt.package_id INNER JOIN TERMS t ON pt.terms_id = t.terms_id INNER JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id WHERE tp.package_type = #{packageType} AND t.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.effective_from <= SYSDATE AND (t.effective_to IS NULL OR t.effective_to >= SYSDATE) ORDER BY pt.display_order ASC NULLS LAST
SELECT t.*, tm.title AS terms_title, tm.terms_type FROM TERMS t INNER JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id WHERE t.terms_id = #{termsId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TERMS_FILES.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TERMS_FILES ( terms_id, file_type, file_path, original_name, stored_name, file_extension, file_size, mime_type, is_primary, uploaded_at ) VALUES ( #{termsId}, #{fileType}, #{filePath}, #{originalName}, #{storedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileExtension, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{mimeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPrimary}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TERMS_STATUS_HISTORY ( terms_id, previous_status, changed_status, changed_by, changed_reason, changed_at ) VALUES ( #{termsId}, #{previousStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changedStatus}, #{changedBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{changedReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT uta.user_id FROM USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS uta WHERE uta.terms_id = #{termsId} AND uta.agreed_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TERMS_NOTIFICATION_HISTORY ( user_id, terms_id, notification_type, sent_yn, read_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{termsId}, #{notificationType}, 'N', 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT t.terms_id, tm.title AS terms_title, tf.file_path, tf.file_type FROM CARD_TERMS ct INNER JOIN TERMS t ON ct.terms_id = t.terms_id INNER JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id LEFT JOIN TERMS_FILES tf ON t.terms_id = tf.terms_id AND tf.is_primary = 'Y' WHERE ct.card_id = #{cardId} AND t.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.effective_from <= SYSDATE AND (t.effective_to IS NULL OR t.effective_to >= SYSDATE) ORDER BY ct.display_order ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT file_id, terms_id, file_type, file_path, original_name, stored_name, file_extension, file_size, mime_type, is_primary, uploaded_at FROM TERMS_FILES WHERE terms_id = #{termsId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, uploaded_at ASC
SELECT terms_master_id, terms_type, title, description, created_at FROM TERMS_MASTERS ORDER BY terms_master_id ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TERMS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TERMS ( terms_master_id, version, content_html, required_yn, reconsent_required_yn, status, effective_from, effective_to, created_at ) VALUES ( #{termsMasterId}, #{version}, #{contentHtml, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{requiredYn}, #{reconsentRequiredYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DRAFT', #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
